case_title: ANGELIQUE SCHUPPEK et al VS. PATRICIA BRETZER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY SCHUPPEK, ANGELIQUE SCHUPPEK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT BRETZER, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRETZER, PATRICIA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY BRETZER, PATRICIA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SCHUPPEK, ANGELIQUE SCHUPPEK, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED NOV-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SCHUPPEK, ANGELIQUE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. RICHARD SCHUPPEK WAIVES SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT'S CROSS-CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. RICHARD SCHUPPEK WAIVES SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT'S CROSS-CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHUPPEK, ANGELIQUE SCHUPPEK, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRETZER, PATRICIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BRETZER, PATRICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SCHUPPEK, ANGELIQUE SCHUPPEK, RICHARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
